summary: Round 2 Role 3 native instruction authority review inspected the revised remaining gaps consensus plan, AGENTS.md, installer hook surfaces, verification docs, completion conditions, and targeted rg results. Verdict: AGREE because Round 1 objections are now represented as explicit P0-05 hard-gate planning requirements, not claimed as implemented.
decisions: P0-05 remains a hard completion blocker in the revised plan.
The plan now requires scanner artifacts, drift signals, fixture failures, verify:goal linkage, status/health/Observatory visibility, and explicit verifier command coverage.
Existing rg results show implementation is not present yet, but the plan honestly treats it as required implementation before completion can be claimed.
next_steps: Implement verify:native-authority and native_instruction_authority status artifact.
Wire native authority status into status:health, verify:goal, and Observatory.
Rerun all ten reviewers after the next revision or implementation pass.
